query: give overview of department of Computer Science?
answer:
[Verification Status] - VERIFIED 
[Retrieved Sources] - University of Peshawar Website - https://www.uop.edu.pk/ - 2023-02-20 - HIGH 
[Conflict Analysis] - No conflicts detected 
[Freshness Check] - The data is fresh, with a timestamp of 2023-02-20, indicating recent information. 
[Final Verified Answer] - The Department of Computer Science at the University of Peshawar is a seat of higher learning in Computer Science in Pakistan. Established in 1985, it is the oldest public sector institution of Computer Science education in the province of Khyber Pakhtunkhwa and one of the oldest in Pakistan. The department has played a pioneering role in the advancement of Computer Science education and growth of IT sector in the province. The department has maintained strong links with industry to explore joint ventures and has produced a large alumnus that can be found working in industry, academics, and research within the country and many parts of the world. The Department of Computer Science is housed in an elegant, classical-style building at a close distance to Road Number 2 and adjacent to the teachers students center (TSC). With the front to Road Number 2, it overlooks the scenic botanical garden that gives it an exquisite look. The department is served by a good number of foreign-qualified faculty that is actively involved in research on current topics in computer science. Some areas of research at the Department of Computer Science are Semantic-Web/Web-Engineering, Software Engineering, Data Ware Housing and Data Mining, Computer Networks, Image Processing and Computer Vision, and Natural Language Processing. The department offers Master (by research), Ph. D., and the conventional MSc. (master by coursework) programs in Computer Science. Its Bachelor of Computer Science (BCS) program is one of the best in the country. The Department has internal library with a good supply of books and well-equipped and well-furnished laboratories. Access to major research journals and other resources is available through HEC and university subscribed links and accounts. The department seeks to acquire the highest standard in research and academics. The unending mission of the department is to keep acquiring resources and capacities to equip students for high-end research and industry-level job-demand. The aim thus is to generate knowledge and impart skills that will enable students in their career goals and benefit the society at large in terms of adequate supply of skilled work-force and new ideas for solving problems. The department has the following vision to achieve this aim: * Strengthening research and academics through up to date curricula, adequate infrastructure, well-qualified faculty, academic and research collaboration with other universities both within and outside the country, and arrangement of conferences, symposia, and conferences. * Collaboration with industry and market-sector. Collaboration with industry brings rich dividend and is beneficial both ways. It helps universities assess industry needs and identify gaps in industrial practices and process and industry to identify skills and knowledge to tape to improve their practices. The department will strengthen its links with industry. * Focus on local needs and problems. Use of technology pervades all aspects of our lives yet effective use of information technology still evades local businesses, organizations, and market sector. The reason for this is, organizations have rules and practices local to our society. Most of the research unfortunately targets the needs and problems of industrialized societies. The department will gear its research to local needs and problems. * Seminars, job fairs, and career-counselling provide important opportunities for students to target potential employers and employers to target potential human resource. The department will intensify job-fairs, seminars, and related activities and attract reputed firms and companies to enable contacts between students and potential employers. The department is part of the Faculty of Numerical and Physical Sciences, and the faculty dean is Dr. Muhammad Iqbal, Professor, Department of Statistics. His contact information is Email: dean_nps@uop.edu.pk, Phone: 091-9222240, PBX: 3191. 
[Confidence Score] - 0.95 
[Hallucination Risk] - LOW

The society aims to promote a campaign to improve the overall campus environment, develop awareness in students regarding environment friendly and green practices, encourage and enhance knowledge, understanding and appreciation of nature, and provide a forum for bringing together experiences related to the environment. query: Tell me about University of Peshwar Boys Hostel?
answer:
The University of Peshawar offers accommodation to its students in eight boys hostels, each with its own unique capacity and facilities. The hostels are:

* Khushal Khan Khattak Hostel No.1, with a capacity of 390 students
* Rehman Baba Hostel No.2, with a capacity of 388 students
* Alama Iqbal Hostel No.9, with a capacity of 338 students
* Dr. Abdul Qadeer Hostel Block D, with a capacity of 313 students
* Engr. Saadat Mand Hostel Block C, with a capacity of 192 students
* Prof Pareshan Khattak Hostel Block A, with a capacity of 438 students
* Abdul Ali Khan Hostel Block B, with a capacity of 438 students
* Quaid E Azam International Hall, with a capacity of 48 students

These hostels are managed by a team of officials, including a Senior Warden, Warden, and Assistant Warden, who are responsible for maintaining law and order, ensuring discipline, and managing the hostel facilities. The Provost Office plays a key role in the administration of the hostels, including the allocation of hostel seats, management of facilities, and maintenance of law and order.

The University has a set of rules and regulations for the hostels, which include the admission process, discipline and conduct of students, and management of hostel facilities. Student societies also play an important role in the hostel life, and are administered by the Provost.

Accommodation in the hostels is limited and is offered to eligible applicants subject to availability. The Resident Warden, in consultation with the Provost, manages the hostel allotments. Overall, the University of Peshawar has a well-organized system of hostels that provides a comfortable and secure living environment for its students.

query: Tell me about University of Peshawar?
answer:
The University of Peshawar is a renowned public research university situated in the heart of Peshawar, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, Pakistan. Established in 1950, it stands as one of the oldest and most prestigious institutions of higher learning in the country. With a strong emphasis on research and academic excellence, the university offers a diverse array of undergraduate, graduate, and postgraduate programs across various disciplines, including arts, humanities, social sciences, natural sciences, and engineering.

The university boasts a vibrant campus life, with a diverse student body and faculty that foster a rich and inclusive academic environment. Extracurricular activities and cultural events are an integral part of campus life, providing students with opportunities to explore their interests and develop their skills.

In addition to its academic programs, the University of Peshawar is home to several research centers and institutes that focus on addressing the region's social, economic, and cultural challenges. The university is committed to community service and outreach, and its research initiatives are designed to have a positive impact on the local community.

The university's mission is to provide high-quality education and research opportunities to its students, and to contribute to the social, economic, and cultural development of the region. With its rich history, academic excellence, and commitment to community service, the University of Peshawar is a premier institution of higher learning in Pakistan.

query: How can i take a admission in UoP?
answer:
To take admission in the University of Peshawar (UoP), you can follow these steps:

Admission Requirements:
- Check the eligibility criteria for your desired program, which can be found on the UoP website or by contacting the relevant department.
- Ensure you have the required documents, including your previous academic records, ID, and any other specified documents.

Application Process:
- Visit the UoP website to access the online application portal. However, please note that live website access is currently limited, so the information may be based on internal/cached records.
- Fill out the application form carefully, providing all the required information and uploading the necessary documents.
- Pay the application fee, if applicable.

Admission Tests and Interviews:
- Some programs may require admission tests or interviews. Check the UoP website or contact the relevant department for specific requirements.
- Prepare for the test or interview by reviewing the relevant material and practicing with sample questions.

Admission Decision:
- After submitting your application, the UoP admissions committee will review your application and make a decision.
- If you are selected, you will receive an offer letter with instructions on how to proceed with the admission process.

Unfortunately, this information is not available at the moment.

query: Admission criteria
answer:
At the University of Peshawar, we strive to provide a comprehensive and inclusive admissions process. To ensure that our students are well-prepared for their academic journey, we have established the following admission criteria:

For Undergraduate Admissions:
• Eligibility: FSc/FA/A-Level or equivalent qualification
• Minimum Marks: 50% marks in the qualifying examination
• Mandatory Test: University Admission Test (UAT)

For Graduate Admissions (Master's):
• Education: 16 years of education
• Minimum CGPA: 2.5/4.0

Please note that these criteria are subject to change, and it's always best to check with our admissions office for the most up-to-date information. We're committed to supporting your academic goals and look forward to welcoming you to our university community.
